urls.page_title: Literary critic Biodun Jeyifo dies at 80 | Cornell Chronicle
urls.page_summary: Biodun “BJ” Jeyifo, a leading literary critic and cultural theorist known for his analysis of modernity and its attendant social and cultural crises, died Feb. 11 in Lagos, Nigeria. He was 80.
